agree_terms: I agree to the Potato Terms and Conditions
onboarding_body_1: Discover the most amazing potato varieties from around the globe. Your journey to becoming a potato expert starts here!
onboarding_body_2: Browse through our curated collection of premium potato types. From Russet to Purple Majesty, find your perfect spud.
onboarding_body_3: Connect with fellow potato enthusiasts, share recipes, and stay updated on the latest potato trends.
validation_terms: Please agree to the Potato Terms
favorites_empty_hint: Tap the heart on any potato to save it here
settings_about_desc: The ultimate app for potato lovers everywhere
logout_subtitle: Sign out of your Potato account
logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
error_no_internet: No internet connection. Please check your network and try again.
error_timeout: The request took too long. Please try again.
error_unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
error_forbidden: You are not allowed to do that.
error_not_found: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
error_validation: Some of the entered data is invalid.
error_server: Something went wrong on the server. Please try again later.
error_unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
